reasoning: As of early November 2025, Bitcoin is trading around $110,000 to $115,000. The target is $170,000 by December 31, 2025, which requires a roughly 50-55% increase in less than two months. While Bitcoin is highly volatile and capable of significant rallies, prediction markets closely track these probabilities. According to an October 28, 2025 report on Polymarket odds, traders gave a 6% chance for Bitcoin to reach $170,000 by the relevant deadline. Earlier in September, when the timeframe was slightly longer, the probability was around 11%. Given the shrinking time window (only about 50 days left from the November 9 cutoff), the likelihood has decreased further. Therefore, a 6% probability reflects the consensus options and prediction market estimates for an extreme upside tail event in this timeframe.
